word: G4778 - συγκακουχέω - synkakouchéō - soong-kak-oo-kheh'-o - Suffer affliction with

sections.paragraph: சுருக்க விளக்கம் / Short Definition: Suffer affliction with
இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Verb / வினைச்சொல்
to treat ill with another; to be ill - treated in company with, share persecutions
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From G4862 and G2558; to maltreat in company with, that is, (passively) endure persecution together: - suffer affliction with.
